title: Non-record submission: recurrent 512 L3 6k (8x H100, 224s)
author: estesryan

data.description: Uses a shared-loop recurrent transformer with looped layers to reuse the same block multiple times.
Non-record submission targeting the 10-minute 16MB track with a compact recurrent architecture and stable convergence.

novel_contributions: Stable convergence within the runtime constraint
Uses looped layers with recurrent depth sharing
